case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. RICARDO FERNANDES OLIVEIRA

docket_entries.description: JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR OPORTUN, INC. ASSIGNED TO JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-18-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-18-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT NARALLANA SANCHEZ LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT RICARDO FERNANDES OLIVERIA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $895.87 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT OLIVEIRA, RICARDO FERNANDES
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY FILED BY ASSIGNEE JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT OLIVEIRA, RICARDO FERNANDES
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT OLIVEIRA, RICARDO FERNANDES
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $50.00) SERVED OCT-07-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT OLIVEIRA, RICARDO FERNANDES
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-18-2019 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,941.15 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT OLIVEIRA, RICARDO FERNANDES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-18-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OLIVEIRA, RICARDO FERNANDES $1,941.15 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,041.15 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
